panel.rationale: Agent workflows are state-machine-heavy; good ideas likely touch routing, checkpoints, or recovery.
Recent work prevents agents from reopening prompt assets and keeps context controller-owned.
Workflow quality depends on asking the right thing at the right time.
Constructor Studio's advantage is deterministic control around nondeterministic agents.
Feature ideas should improve real usage, not only internal elegance.

resource_context.summary: Strongest brainstorm anchors are execution plans, shared-context-pack boundaries, agent/subagent integration, deterministic validation, and UX trust surfaces.

resources.why_relevant: Primary source for SHARED_CONTEXT_PACK ownership, final prompt synthesis, and leaf-agent isolation rules.
Source for phase flow, decomposition strategy, compiled phase semantics, and status lifecycle.
Defines generate/analyze workflow surface, clarify/save behavior, routing scope, and agent entry-point boundaries.
Source for host-native subagent orchestration, isolated contexts, and task-specific delegation modes.
Adoption and trust surface for diagnostics, self-check, and low-friction remediation loops.
Top-level product intent for determinism-first workflows, execution plans, agent integration, and UX expectations.
System-level component and sequence view for skill engine, validator, agent generator, and delegated execution.

decisions.feature_direction: Improve cf-brainstorm -> wrap as a thin MVP slice for Agent workflows.
decisions.recovery_semantics: Conservative adaptive resume: resume only after deterministic state integrity check; otherwise rewind to the last valid checkpoint, then offer workflow switch.
decisions.context_failure_policy: Tiered: hard fail for boundary, security, or contract violations; reduced mode or user choice only for non-critical gaps.
decisions.workflow_navigation: Adaptive navigator: recommend one path when intent is confident; show 2-3 outcome-based paths when ambiguous.
decisions.phase_handoff_visibility: Compact ledger line: always show one compact state line; require confirmation only for risk, ambiguity, or fallback.
decisions.brainstorm_handoff: Single recommended primary handoff; optional secondary handoff only on request or high ambiguity.
decisions.menu_labels: Outcome label first, workflow name secondary.
decisions.validator_visibility: Tiered: hard failures immediately, warnings grouped at checkpoints or wrap.
decisions.repair_behavior: Offer repair menu in later slices; repeated prompt/workflow defects may produce patch proposals in wrap summaries.
decisions.trust_preview: Compact line with next action, fallback behavior, and rough cost/time.
decisions.learning_signal: Hybrid bounded: implicit choices plus optional one-click feedback for uncertain recommendations; applies only to repo/task defaults and diagnostics, never safety or contract rules.
decisions.context_provenance: Compact by default, expandable detail in verbose/on request.
decisions.context_slice_reuse: Lease-based in later slices: reuse only when purpose, scope, and TTL match the new dispatch.
decisions.mvp_boundary: cf-brainstorm -> wrap only: compact ledger line, hard context validation, single primary handoff path, and save-full-session outcome.
decisions.save_behavior: Save full brainstorm session state as a standalone wrap outcome without starting cf-plan or cf-generate.
decisions.wrap_menu: Primary: Create an implementation plan (cf-plan). Save/finish: Save the full brainstorm session; Finish without saving. Other: Clarify scope (cf-explore / cf-analyze); Show context details.

topic.text: Find high-leverage feature ideas for Constructor Studio agent workflows, especially generate/analyze/plan/brainstorm behavior, context handling, sub-agent orchestration, and user-facing phase flow.

feature_ideas: Workflow Contract Validator and Anti-Pattern Scanner
Trust Loop Features: Preview, Commit, and Learn
rounds.critique_summary: The feature is coherent, but can become ceremony if ledger, context, and provenance surfaces are too verbose. MVP should stay narrow.

topic.text: Find high-leverage feature ideas for Constructor Studio agent workflows, especially generate/analyze/plan/brainstorm behavior, context handling, sub-agent orchestration, and user-facing phase flow.

Design the UX wrap menu for cf-brainstorm MVP: outcome labels, single recommended primary handoff, optional secondary handoff, compact ledger/context validation line, and Russian-language user-facing clarity.

rounds.outcome: Accepted wrap menu with an explicit save-full-session outcome.

open_questions.text: What exact compact ledger fields are required for the cf-brainstorm -> wrap MVP?
What deterministic state/context checks define a valid primary handoff from cf-brainstorm to cf-plan?

wrap_menu.status_line: Outcome: direction selected. Context: verified - 3 anchors - next step ~5-10 min - fallback: return to the valid checkpoint.

save_or_finish.label: Save the full brainstorm session
save_or_finish.effect: write full session state without workflow handoff
